title: picea abies var. procumbens
intro: Picea abies var. procumbens, also known as the procumbent Norway spruce, is a variety of the Norway spruce tree (Picea abies) that has a unique habit of growing close to the ground. The medicinal properties of Picea abies var. procumbens include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system, making it a popular choice in herbal medicine for treating respiratory infections and other conditions. Picea abies var. procumbens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
